import React from 'react'; import './Projects.css'; const PROJECTS = [ { id: 1, title: 'Mark Cuban - Billionaire Journey', category: 'YouTube', year: '2024', desc: 'Long-form documentary edit, 2.1M views', accent: '#4361ee', accentSoft: 'rgba(67,97,238,0.38)', }, { id: 2, title: 'Brand Anthem - Nike India', category: 'Commercial', year: '2024', desc: '60s brand spot, color graded in DaVinci', accent: '#f72585', accentSoft: 'rgba(247,37,133,0.36)', }, { id: 3, title: 'Afterglow - Music Video', category: 'Music Video', year: '2023', desc: 'Cinematic MV, 540K views on YouTube', accent: '#7b5ea7', accentSoft: 'rgba(123,94,167,0.34)', }, { id: 4, title: 'Delwinder - Sports Doc', category: 'Documentary', year: '2024', desc: '10-min sports documentary, film festivals', accent: '#4361ee', accentSoft: 'rgba(67,97,238,0.38)', }, { id: 5, title: 'Post Breakup Emotions', category: 'Short Film', year: '2023', desc: 'Narrative short, festival circuit', accent: '#f72585', accentSoft: 'rgba(247,37,133,0.36)', }, { id: 6, title: 'Finance Creator Package', category: 'YouTube', year: '2024', desc: 'Ongoing editing for 920K subscriber channel', accent: '#7b5ea7', accentSoft: 'rgba(123,94,167,0.34)', }, ]; export default function Projects() { return (

Selected Work

A few things I've made recently.

{PROJECTS.map((project) => (
{project.category}

{project.title}

{project.desc}

{project.year} ↗
))}
); }
